title: Master Conflict-free Replicated Data Types (CRDTs)
description: Architect 'Local-First' collaborative applications using CRDTs. Master the use of LWW-Registers, G-Counters, and Sequence types for eventual consistency in real-time systems.
objectives: Master the use of LWW-Registers, G-Counters, and Sequence types for eventual consistency in real-time systems.
